what_it_does: [CVPR 2024] This is the official source for our paper "SyncTalk: The Devil is in the Synchronization for Talking Head Synthesis"; audio -> rendered talking head/video
succinct_summary: 3D/NeRF talking head: [CVPR 2024] This is the official source for our paper "SyncTalk: The Devil is in the Synchronization for Talking Head Synthesis"

important_notes: Researchy synchronization-focused 3D talking head; less immediate for Morgan portrait crop. Manifests: requirements.txt.
